message:
test(quic): add comprehensive QUIC stream integration tests

New test file with end-to-end QUIC protocol tests using real network
connections with self-signed certificates.

Test coverage:
- QUIC-STREAM-001: Open bidirectional stream and exchange data
- QUIC-STREAM-002: Open unidirectional stream for one-way messages
- QUIC-STREAM-003/004: Accept incoming bi/uni streams (server side)
- QUIC-STREAM-005: Write and read large data (100KB echo test)
- QUIC-STREAM-006: Stream finish (half-close) with continued reading
- QUIC-STREAM-007: Stream reset aborts in-flight data

Cancellation tests:
- QUIC-CANCEL-001: Cancel during write cleans up stream
- QUIC-CANCEL-002: Cancel during read cleans up stream
- QUIC-CANCEL-003: Connection close cleans up all streams

Unit tests for StreamTracker:
- Verify starts non-closing
- Mark closing transitions state
- Closing is idempotent

Tests use rcgen for self-signed certs, insecure_skip_verify for
client simplicity, and proper connection lifecycle management
with server waiting for client close.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
